title: aira alpina var. vivipara
intro: Aira alpina var. vivipara, also known as viviparous hair grass, is a unique plant species that reproduces by producing seeds within its leaves, allowing it to grow without the need for germination. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. Viviparous hair grass is also said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. Traditional herbal preparations involve infusing the plant in hot water or making a tincture to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its benefits.
